verification_note: v4 generates each language independently with native-language prompts. ILI tag counts differ across languages because different languages express the same concepts with different numbers of content words. This is expected and correct.

hypernym.definition: an arbitrary sign (written or printed) that has acquired a conventional significance

hyponyms.definition: a written or printed symbol (as for punctuation)
a written symbol that is used to represent speech
any written symbol standing for a sound or syllable or morpheme or word
